ios.comment: Fill ascAppId (App Store Connect app id) + appleTeamId, or run `eas submit -p ios` interactively. Apple API key is cached in EAS from session 14.

android.comment: Play Console: create the app, upload one AAB manually first, then a Google service-account JSON (serviceAccountKeyPath) enables `eas submit -p android`. Production Android needs an AAB build (eas build -p android --profile production), not the preview APK.
